title: 11 Herbal Creams For Nail Fungus
description: Eucalyptus globulus creams contains compounds like eucalyptol, caffeic acid, and globulol that have antifungal properties. Eucalyptol helps to reduce fungal growth by disrupting the cell membrane of the fungus, making it harder for it to survive. Caffeic acid has antimicrobial properties that help to prevent the spread of fungal infections. Globulol, on the other hand, has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe and calm the nail and surrounding skin. By using these compou...
